name: Exodus Movement, Inc.
business: Exodus Movement, Inc. provides a self-custodial digital asset wallet platform (Exodus Platform) that allows users to securely control and manage over 700,000 digital assets, and access third-party services such as digital asset exchanging, fiat onboarding, and staking. The company earns revenue primarily from fees charged to third-party API Providers for services offered to users, with the majority of revenue derived from transaction-based agreements for users located outside the United States.

exposures.sentence: We operate in the FinTech subsector of the greater blockchain and digital asset industry.

catalysts.sentence: This launch, anticipated for early 2026, is the first step in Exodus evolution from a self-custodial digital asset wallet into a single app for holding, spending, and transferring digital dollars, without compromising self-custody.
The transaction is expected to close in 2026.
